subject: Project pulse: workshop execution in Rome | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-1357
body: Intelligence from Rome indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the workshop banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Marie Curie. Reference initiative INIT-1357. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
